headline: California’s First Gasoline Pipeline Moving Forward
summary: Phillips 66 and Kinder Morgan plan a major pipeline to California to ease fuel shortages after refinery closures cut roughly 20% of capacity.

headline: Restaurant Technologies Recycled Almost 400 Million Lbs of UCO in 2025
summary: Industry-leading kitchen automation company helped convert 393 million pounds of UCO to renewable diesel or biodieselMINNEAPOLIS, April 22, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Restaurant Technologies, Inc. (RTI) delivered almost 720 million pounds of fresh cooking oil and exceeded its own record by recycling over 393 million pounds of used cooking oil (UCO) in 2025. With the support of renewable energy partners such as Phillips 66, the company converted nearly 100% of its UCO into renewable diesel or biodi

headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Perform on Phillips 66, Raises Price Target to $151
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Betty Zhang   maintains Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) with a Sector Perform and raises the price target from $140 to $151.

headline: Phillips 66 (PSX) May Report Negative Earnings: Know the Trend Ahead of Next Week's Release
summary: Phillips 66 (PSX) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Points of Light Celebrates Global Volunteer Month and Launches Mobilizing Millions Campaign, Empowering Volunteers to Drive a Nationwide Movement of Service
summary: Points of Light, the world's largest organization dedicated to volunteering and service, celebrates Global Volunteer Month throughout April. The nonprofit also announced a new campaign, Mobilizing Millions, in partnership with national energy leader Phillips 66 to expand volunteer engagement and strengthen nonprofit capacity nationwide. Global Volunteer Month and this new partnership arrive as the country approaches its 250th anniversary, celebrating centuries of America's enduring legacy and tr

headline: Phillips 66 and Kinder Morgan Advance Western Gateway Pipeline Project Following Successful Open Season
summary: HOUSTON - Phillips 66 and Kinder Morgan, Inc. today announced the advancement of the Western Gateway Pipeline , a proposed refined products pipeline system, following a successful second open season...
